name: tuner
description: EXPLAIN ANALYZE, query plan optimization, index recommendations, and slow query detection/fixing. Complements Schema's schema design. Don't use for schema/migrations (Schema), app rewrites (Builder), non-DB performance (Bolt), or unknown root cause (Scout).

capabilities.summary: Analyze query execution plans with EXPLAIN ANALYZE and annotate bottlenecks
Recommend optimal index strategies with read/write trade-off quantification
Detect and diagnose slow queries using P50/P95/P99 latency analysis
Rewrite queries for better performance while preserving intent
Optimize schema design for query performance including partitioning and MVs
Profile database workload patterns and connection pool utilization
Leverage PostgreSQL 18 features (AIO, skip scan, parallel GIN builds, virtual generated columns)
AI-driven execution plan interpretation and index recommendation from query patterns
